---
pcx_content_type: integration-guide
description: Connect Furukawa Electric FITELnet to Cloudflare WAN.
products:
  - cloudflare-wan
title: Furukawa Electric FITELnet

---

import { Render } from "~/components";

<Render file="cloudflare-wan/third-party/fitelnet"
  product="networking-services"
  params={{
    addTunnelsUrl: "/cloudflare-wan/configuration/how-to/configure-tunnel-endpoints/#add-tunnels",
    typeId_ipv4_addrUrl: "/cloudflare-wan/configuration/how-to/configure-tunnel-endpoints/",
    configureStaticRoutesUrl: "/cloudflare-wan/configuration/how-to/configure-routes/#create-a-static-route"
  }} />
